promotion_rule_enforced: DERIVED requires full-ODE identifiability + falsification pass

beta.hypothesis: beta(X) has uniquely identified canonical form in production domain
beta.observable_discriminant: ODE map sensitivity of [A_s, n_s, r, N, T_reh, z_rec, eta_B] to beta_scale
beta.pass_criteria: full-rank identifiability and no practically equivalent alternative beta_scale in bounded box
beta.rejection_implications: keep beta(X) provisional and publish non-uniqueness path

lambda_rec.hypothesis: absolute lambda_rec(X) is uniquely fixed (not only ratio-level)
lambda_rec.observable_discriminant: independent leverage beyond lambda_rec/beta ratio in ODE observables
lambda_rec.rejection_implications: keep only ratio-level closure and absolute form provisional

g_OmegaX.hypothesis: interaction coupling has no residual effective dial
g_OmegaX.observable_discriminant: degeneracy collapse under bounded g0 scans
g_OmegaX.pass_criteria: identifiability pass and zero residual dial under consistency constraints
g_OmegaX.rejection_implications: retain constrained status with explicit free-dial declaration

V_X.hypothesis: a single canonical potential family is uniquely selected
V_X.observable_discriminant: cross-family ODE falsification on [n_s, r, A_s, N]
V_X.pass_criteria: all alternatives rejected at agreed thresholds and identifiability remains full-rank
V_X.rejection_implications: retain chosen_non_unique with formal non-uniqueness proof

beta.reason: rank-deficient or non-unique map; keep canonical beta(X) as provisional

lambda_rec.reason: only ratio-level closure lambda_rec/beta is currently justified

g_OmegaX.reason: effective dial remains; keep constrained status

V_X.reason: theory-band remains; keep CHOSEN with formal non-uniqueness note
